ddls:
CREATE TABLE "pharmaceutical_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pharmaceutical company */,
  "tax_rate" REAL /* Effective tax rate applicable to the company */,
  "undistributed_offshore" REAL /* Total undistributed earnings retained offshore by the company */,
  "taxes_owed" REAL /* Total taxes owed by the company */,
  "intangibles_listed" REAL /* Value of intangible assets listed in financial statements */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "market_cap_source" TEXT /* Source for the market capitalization data */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "industry_segment" TEXT /* Segment of the pharmaceutical industry the company operates in */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total annual revenue */,
  "profit_margin" REAL /* Profit margin as a percentage */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial metric entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pharmaceutical company */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the financial metrics */,
  "nta" REAL /* Net tangible assets of the company */,
  "nta_intangibles_source" TEXT /* Source for net tangible assets and intangibles data */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt to equity ratio */,
  "current_ratio" REAL /* Current ratio (current assets / current liabilities) */,
  "return_on_assets" REAL /* Return on assets as a percentage */,
  "return_on_equity" REAL /* Return on equity as a percentage */,
  "operating_cash_flow" REAL /* Operating cash flow */,
  "capital_expenditures" REAL /* Capital expenditures */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings before interest, taxes, depreciation, and amortization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_metrics_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES pharmaceutical_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pharmaceutical company analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis report */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path for the detailed report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Brief description of the analysis methodology */,
  "recommendations" TEXT /* Recommendations based on the analysis */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_analysis_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES pharmaceutical_companies ("company_id")
)
